script:
python -c "import urllib.request

print('Test 1: Requesting api.github.com...')
try:
    response = urllib.request.urlopen('https://api.github.com', timeout=15)
    print(f'  SUCCESS: status {response.status}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'  ERROR: {e}')

print()
print('Test 2: Requesting httpbin.org...')
try:
    response = urllib.request.urlopen('https://httpbin.org/get', timeout=15)
    print(f'  SUCCESS: status {response.status}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'  ERROR: {e}')

print()
print('Done.')"
